---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature for Daily Doom
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Summary:**
Brief description of the feature.

**Background:**
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

**Proposed Implementation:**
How should this feature work?

**Technical Requirements:**
- Specific systems/files affected
- Performance considerations
- Dependencies on other features

**Gameplay Impact:**
How does this feature improve the player experience?

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Feature implemented as described
- [ ] Unit test added (T2-XX in playtester)
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] Performance maintained (60+ FPS)
- [ ] Devlog entry written

**Priority:** [Low / Medium / High / Critical]

**Files to modify:** [e.g. `renderer.js`, `game.js`]
